## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SentinelOne and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, CVE publishing, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Plan to publish 15 CVEs/week initially, increasing gradually (max 50/week) based on Google indexing](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [New content ideas uploaded to Airtable for approval; focus on revamping 5 existing blogs](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [SentinelOne actively optimizing older CS101 content; may need GrowthX's help for rewrites](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Mid-October launch target for Contentful pipeline integration](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

## Topics

### CVE Publishing Strategy

  - [Recommendation: Start with 15 CVEs/week, increase by 5 if indexed well](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Max 50 CVEs/week to ensure proper indexing](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Over 3,000 CVEs in database, categorized by date](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Ankit to handle implementation; follow-up via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Content Updates and Approvals

  - [New keyword research completed, new assignments uploaded to Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Topics for 3 clusters available in "Customer View, Ideas to Approve"](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [2 new blogs in progress this week](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [5 existing blogs being significantly revamped based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [2 blogs published recently: prompt hacking and adversarial attacks](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [2 more blogs pending PMM approval, likely published Friday/Monday](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### CS101 Content Strategy

  - [Many CS101 articles ranking for relevant keywords, but not always highly](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [SentinelOne currently optimizing numerous articles internally](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Initial CS101 strategy focused on volume, now shifting to quality](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [GrowthX offered assistance with content refreshes and rewrites if needed](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)

### Ongoing Projects

  - [Dev team working with SentinelOne's web team on Contentful pipeline setup](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Mid-October launch target for integration](https://fathom.video/share/cp5yXy5AHe7oeBNEXtuNGD6noryeyskA?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
